meaning: 基达[巴基斯坦西部城市]
examples: The blast wounded more than 80 others in the southwestern city of Quetta.
Quetta is a frontier city about a three-hour drive from Kandahar in Afghanistan.
The 6.4 magnitude earthquake struck northeast of Quetta, the capital of Baluchistan.
Associated Press Writers Rasool Dawar in Peshawar and Abdul Sattar in Quetta contributed to this report.
The route includes stopovers in Quetta, near the Afghan border, and in the Iranian capital, Tehran.
